response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows platforms, fixed income or capital markets domain expertise, and SQL Server/Oracle proficiency — all mandatory requirements. Their background is heavily focused on JavaScript/TypeScript, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of financial systems development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops and talks
concerns: No visible C++ experience on Windows — critical for role
No evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience listed generically without SQL Server or Oracle specifics
